body:
If you are looking to boost your curb appeal with a unique, custom-fabricated garage door in Pleasanton, you have a few excellent highly-rated local and regional options that specialize in custom builds (ranging from handcrafted wood to modern glass and steel).

Here are the top companies serving the Pleasanton area for custom fabrications:

### 1\. RW Garage Doors (Right Way Garage Doors)

RW Garage Doors is highly regarded in the Bay Area because they don't just install—they are a premier garage door manufacturing and service company. [Garage Door Company in Pleasanton, CA - Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/garage-door-company-in-pleasanton-ca/#:~:text=As%20the%20premier%20garage%20door,and%20options%20to%20choose%20from.)

  * **Specialty:** They are known for their own **handcrafted custom wood garage doors** , as well as custom modern glass and steel combinations. [Garage Door Company in Pleasanton, CA - Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/garage-door-company-in-pleasanton-ca/#:~:text=MODERN%20GARAGE%20DOORS%20IN%20PLEASANTON,handcrafted%20custom%20wood%20garage%20doors.)

  * **Perks:** They offer free consultations and a 110% price match guarantee. [Garage Door Company in Pleasanton, CA - Right Way Garage Doors](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/garage-door-company-in-pleasanton-ca/#:~:text=With%20options%20in%20traditional%20steel,Book%20your%20FREE%20Consultation%20Today!)

### 2\. Precision Garage Door of the East Bay

A massive, Diamond-Certified name in the region with dedicated service coverage for Pleasanton.

  * **Specialty:** Precision specializes in tailoring doors to unique architectural styles. They offer extensive customization options for carriage house doors, specialty steel, and contemporary full-view glass doors.

  * **Perks:** Highly certified technicians and robust warranties on custom parts and labor.

### 3\. Graham Garage Doors

A locally run business servicing Pleasanton that focuses heavily on custom residential installations. [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Services%20in%20Pleasanton,Coupons)

  * **Specialty:** They offer an online "door builder" tool to help you sketch out your concept, specializing in custom wood doors and high-end upgrades from top-tier manufacturers like Clopay, Amarr, and Martin. [Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.grahamgaragedoors.net/city/pleasanton-california#:~:text=Craft%20your%20perfect%20garage%20door,24%20X%207%20Emergency)

  * **Perks:** Excellent focus on energy-efficient insulated custom options.

### 4\. WeDo GarageDoor

Servicing the Tri-Valley area, they accommodate completely non-standard sizes and material preferences.

  * **Specialty:** Customized builds using wood composite, fiberglass, vinyl, aluminum, and glass. They specialize in building to fit non-standard or irregular garage openings.

> **Pro-Tip:** Because Pleasanton has specific HOA guidelines and community design standards in many neighborhoods (like Ruby Hill or Stoneridge areas), make sure to ask whichever company you choose if they provide architectural submittal sheets for HOA approval before fabrication begins.

What specific architectural style or material (e.g., sleek modern glass, rustic reclaimed wood, or classic carriage house) are you looking to match your home with?

By the way, to unlock the full functionality of all Apps, enable [Gemini Apps Activity](https://myactivity.google.com/product/gemini).
